title: Târgu Mureș, Mureș — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Târgu Mureș is a city in Mureș with a population of 134,290. A multicultural Transylvanian city with a stunning Art Nouveau Palace of Culture, a historic Hungarian heritage, and a renowned medical university.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
